reviews.comment:
¿Alguien sabe porqué no atienden los teléfono ? 6-7-22
Estuve allí porque noté que no andaba el limpiaparabrisas delantero. Me dijeron que era un problema serio y que había que sacar todo el mecanismo desde el volante . auto con 200.000 km. Fui al mecánico electricista y sólo era un cambio de fusible. Algo sencillo que ni siquiera se dignó el mecánico (que no tenía autos para atender) en constatar que se había quemado. Patética atención,

(Translated by Google)
Does anyone know why they're not answering the phones? 6-7-22
I went there because I noticed the front windshield wipers weren't working. They told me it was a serious problem and that the entire mechanism had to be removed from the steering wheel. The car has 200,000 km. I went to an auto electrician and it was just a fuse replacement. Something simple that the mechanic (who didn't have any other cars to work on) didn't even bother to check if it had blown. Pathetic service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURPMGVHajB3RRAB
